nodes.name: 人类活动扰动
nodes.summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: Paria whitestart
nodes.summary: Paria whitestart（Paria whitestart，学名 Myioborus pariae），在图谱中标记为濒危（EN）物种，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、人类活动扰动。

nodes.name: EN
nodes.summary: EN表示 IUCN 濒危等级，当前关联384种鸟类，如朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭、黑脸琵鹭等384种鸟类。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is threatened by on-going habitat loss within its tiny range, which is near-entirely contained within the Península de Paria National Park

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: However, the southern slope of Cerro Humo, which may support a substantial amount of the existing Paria whitestart population, is not within the boundaries of the park and is accessible by road, and suffers from increased habitat disturbance and forest clearance as a result
